name: international_security_municipal_bond_northpine_tru_loy
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In International Security, the situation tagged internally around international security municipal bond northpine tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Priya Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Priya Alvarez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in International Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Luc Serrano
agents.identity: I am Luc Serrano, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in International Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Priya Alvarez must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Priya Alvarez do?
